summary.rootFinding: Open Design Pipeline/Kanban was not wrong. ProfitsLocal external runs were bypassing the chat persistence layer, so successful `/api/runs` executions left no `messages.run_id/run_status` rows for the app to classify. The UI therefore fell back to `not_started` even when the concept files were generated correctly.
summary.fixApplied: ProfitsLocal `run-concept` and `continue-concept` now create/update an assistant message tied to the Open Design conversation and persist `run_id`, `run_status`, timestamps, and produced files.
summary.verifiedOutcome: A fresh app-visible project and a continuation run now both resolve to `status.value = succeeded` when the Open Design status composition logic is run against the shared `.od` database.
